audio_and_caption_sources.caption_text_policy: Visible rail captions and YouTube sidecars must be generated from the locked script text. ASR, SRT, VTT, and WhisperX artifacts may supply timing only.

story_time_model.music_contract_retime_note: A later music integration contract may add an intro voice-start offset; proof times and caption sidecars must be retimed there before rough assembly.

rail_text_model.active_panel: major chapter label, semantic active title, one short summary
rail_text_model.context_rows: nearby previous/upcoming semantic chapter titles only

rail_palette_intent.source_aware_palette: warm lamp amber, gray plaster and tile, worn wood doorway shadow, muted cream caption text, restrained hospital daylight
rail_palette_intent.readability_strategy: localized active-panel fill and caption softener only; no broad full-frame dark veil and no full-height opaque right-column panel

chapters.title: Measured, Not Explained
chapters.rail_summary: The episode opens on a documented mortality gap that the institution could see but could not explain.
chapters.story_anchor: Vienna mortality gap, First Division danger, Second Division contrast, and Semmelweis finding and proving the cause.
chapters.visual_behavior: Start on the kept threshold plate with a settled rail state; basin and ward doorway hold the central question without charts or ledgers.

chapters.title: Two Wards, Same Roof
chapters.rail_summary: The First and Second Divisions create the controlled contrast: physicians/students versus midwives.
chapters.story_anchor: Teaching hospital structure, physicians and students in the First Division, midwives in the Second, and leadership explanations that failed.
chapters.visual_behavior: Rail language carries the comparison; source plate stays at the threshold and avoids ledger, chart, or paperwork visuals.

chapters.title: Autopsy To Ward
chapters.rail_summary: Kolletschka's death makes the transfer path visible, and the chloride-of-lime basin becomes the intervention.
chapters.story_anchor: Teaching autopsy injury, sepsis resemblance, physicians moving from autopsy room to maternity ward, and chloride-of-lime washing.
chapters.visual_behavior: Source attention follows the existing left autopsy-room context, basin threshold, and ward depth with no arrows, labels, or gore.

chapters.title: The Evidence Had Layers
chapters.rail_summary: Data, contact pathway, and intervention results stack into a case the profession should have acted on.
chapters.story_anchor: Two ward mortality records, autopsy contact pathway, handwashing result, and the decisive point where data-driven medicine should have moved.
chapters.visual_behavior: Semantic right-rail progression carries the layers; no ordinal-only viewer labels, mortality graph, table, or admin evidence prop appears.

chapters.title: The Result Became An Accusation
chapters.rail_summary: The missing germ-theory framework gives critics cover while the evidence points at physicians themselves.
chapters.story_anchor: Unexplained mechanism, lack of germ theory, technical skepticism, and the identity-level implication that physicians were carrying disease.
chapters.visual_behavior: Plate settles darker and quieter while rail names the accusation; no germ icons, face-forward blame, or explanatory diagram overlays.

chapters.title: Resistance Hardened
chapters.rail_summary: The intervention holds, but criticism and institutional rejection persist until Semmelweis's death.
chapters.story_anchor: Critics, persistent resistance, repeated intervention results, open letters, institutional commitment, and death before germ theory acceptance.
chapters.visual_behavior: Rail cadence slows for resistance and death; source plate remains respectful and avoids asylum, wound, deathbed, or horror imagery.

chapters.title: Wrong In A Structural Way
chapters.rail_summary: The standard hero-story frame opens into professional identity, accusation, and the later reframing supplied by germ theory.
chapters.story_anchor: Profession organized skepticism around a damaging conclusion, evidence as accusation, identity conflict, and germ theory reframing.
chapters.visual_behavior: Source-art motion calms while rail moves from individual hero story to structural identity; no new laboratory scene or microbe animation.

chapters.title: The Data Was Always Sufficient
chapters.rail_summary: The closing synthesis names a system that could not afford to believe the evidence until the story around it changed.
chapters.story_anchor: Semmelweis by 1865, antiseptic practice by the 1880s, evidence sufficient by 1848, institutional cost of belief, and series motif.
chapters.visual_behavior: Rail energy narrows into synthesis and suppresses story text before the future end-screen handoff.

typography_cues.trigger: a problem it could measure but not explain
The difference was documented.
Much of the medical establishment rejected him.
The death rates told a story no one wanted to read.
None of these explanations survived contact with the data.
moved between the autopsy room and the maternity ward
typography_cues.treatment: threshold source-attention cue plus right-rail title shift

typography_cues.trigger: the hands of the people conducting examinations
typography_cues.treatment: rail phrase emphasis, no hand close-up

typography_cues.trigger: wash their hands in a chloride of lime solution
typography_cues.treatment: basin/source highlight cue with no new demonstration

typography_cues.trigger: The results were immediate.
what the evidence actually required the profession to believe
physician contact after autopsies
hand-washing sharply reduced mortality
The evidence was not ambiguous.
accepting the evidence meant accusing the physicians themselves
what it pointed at was themselves
typography_cues.treatment: rail contrast lift, no visual blame marker

typography_cues.trigger: He was actively resisted.
The results held.
one man who was right and a profession that was wrong
wrong in a specific, structural way
it was an accusation
Germ theory, when it arrived, provided that framework.
The evidence did not change.
not better data
That is not a failure of evidence.
The cause chain was longer.
typography_cues.treatment: series motif emphasis before outro handoff

effect_moments.treatment: settled Candidate F plate, right rail enters cleanly over quiet right wall, basin visible as dormant hinge
rail shifts to two-division contrast while source plate holds autopsy-room/ward threshold
rail-only compression of false explanations; no bell, miasma effect, or horror treatment
attention drift favors left autopsy-room context and doorway path, preserving anonymous figures and avoiding gore

effect_moments.trigger: autopsy room to maternity ward routine
effect_moments.treatment: subtle depth emphasis along corridor from autopsy context toward maternity ward; no arrows or labels
source-safe highlight around basin, porcelain, metal vessel, and practical lamp
rail language carries mortality drop; no chart, table, ledger, or admin prop
right rail progresses through evidence layers using semantic titles only
rail contrast narrows around missing mechanism; no germ icons or microscope graphics
plate settles darker and quieter while rail names accusation; no visual blame marker
rail cadence slows for criticism and resistance; source plate stays institutional and restrained
minimal respectful source settling; no asylum imagery, wound close-up, deathbed visual, or horror imagery
rail reframes from hero story to system identity; source-art motion calms
subtle daylight/practical-light shift may support reframing; no microbe animation or explanatory diagram
rail synthesis emphasizes sufficiency of original data; plate remains same kept threshold
suppress captions and rail story text before future static YouTube end-screen target geometry

allowed_in_cue_map: source-art transform, crop, opacity, localized readability treatment, rail transition, rail typography, caption timing, end-screen text suppression

next_action: Human review must mark this cue map keep, tighten, or reject. A keep may open the living_cover_ambient_effects_layer gate.
